User interface prototype for the AI Research Assistant.  This module implements a lightweight Streamlit-based frontend that allows users to upload research documents, submit queries, and view AI-generated responses with citations.  It interacts with backend API endpoints to demonstrate the full pipeline, including document processing, retrieval, reasoning, and citation tracking.  The interface is designed for simplicity and clarity, enabling quick demonstration of system capabilities in a real-world scenario.
